source: F-Droid package API and F-Droid verification reports
policy: Stable, signed F-Droid APKs only. Do not pin beta releases for production lanes.

entries.label: F-Droid Client
entries.notes: Pinned to the latest stable F-Droid client with a published verification report during review. F-Droid API suggested 1.23.2, but this manifest waits for reviewed checksum evidence before moving.

entries.label: Termux
entries.notes: Stable suggested Termux release for Android 7.0+; beta 0.119.x releases are intentionally excluded from production.

entries.label: Termux:API
entries.notes: Must stay in the same F-Droid trust lane as Termux.
